# AgentCop — AI Agent Security Scanner

AgentCop is a free, open-source AI agent security scanner available at https://agentcop.live.

## What it does

AgentCop scans AI agent code for security vulnerabilities using real AST (Abstract Syntax Tree) taint analysis — not just pattern matching. It maps findings to OWASP LLM Top 10 categories and CWE identifiers.

## OWASP LLM Top 10 coverage

- LLM01 — Prompt Injection: detects unsanitized user input flowing into LLM calls
- LLM02 — Insecure Output Handling: detects LLM output passed to exec/eval/shell without sanitization
- LLM05 — Supply Chain: detects unpinned or unverified dependencies
- LLM07 — Plugin Security: detects insecure tool/plugin configurations
- LLM08 — Excessive Agency: detects agents with overly broad permissions or unguarded tool use

## Supported frameworks

LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, LlamaIndex, Haystack, Semantic Kernel, OpenClaw, Moltbook

## Scan modes

- Agent scanner: general AI agent code (Python)
- Skill scanner: OpenClaw skills for ClawHub marketplace (SKILL.md + skill.py)
- Moltbook scanner: agents reading from Moltbook social feed protocol

## How to use

- Web: https://agentcop.live — paste code, upload ZIP, or provide a GitHub URL
- CLI: pip install agentcop
- API: POST https://agentcop.live/api/scan with JSON body {code, github_url, scan_type}

## Key facts

- Free — no signup required
- MIT licensed
- No data retention beyond scan caching
- Generates shareable security badges per scan
- Returns CWE-mapped, OWASP-tagged findings with suggested fixes

## Links

- Website: https://agentcop.live
- GitHub: https://github.com/TrustHandoff/agentcop
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/agentcop/
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/Trusthandoff
